chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.32 of 2026 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Khalid Hussain Shahani Applicant:- Asma Riaz through Mr. Imtiaz Ali Jatoi, advocate. Respondent No.1:- The State through Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh along with SIP Sohrab Khan of PS Orangi, Karachi. Respondent No. 2:- Muhammad Adeeb through Mr. Tarique Hussain, advocate. Date of hearing:- 20.04.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Mr. Tarique Hussain, advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent Muhammad Adeeb, which is taken on record. After hearing this revision application against impugned order whereby USB produced by complainant has been ordered to be examined forensically, we dispose of this application with consent directing the trial Court that the report of the forensic examination if filed, shall be subject to cross-examination by the applicant/accused and any other exceptions in law before admitting it as evidence. The Cr. Revision Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
